title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Honda Motorcycle India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Honda Motorcycle India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Honda Motorcycle India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
